# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: IAM role for cross-account CI/CD access, allowing assumption from multiple AWS accounts within an AWS Organization using wildcards in the trust policy.

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: The ID of your AWS Organization (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxx). This is used to restrict role assumption to accounts within your organization.
    AllowedPattern: "^o-[a-z0-9]{10,32}$"
    ConstraintDescription: Organization ID must start with 'o-' followed by 10 to 32 lowercase alphanumeric characters.
  CICDRoleNamePattern:
    Type: String
    Description: A wildcard pattern
